block.rocketnautics.rocket_thruster.summ: The _core_ of any liquid-fueled _rocket_. Requires a constant supply of _propellant_ (Lava) to generate _thrust_. Throttling is controlled via pump _RPM_. _Warning_: exhaust is _extremely hot_!
block.rocketnautics.vector_thruster.funn: _Engineers_ discovered that if you _wiggle_ the engine, the rocket goes a _different_ way. _Revolutionary!_
block.rocketnautics.vector_thruster.summ: A _steerable_ _liquid_ engine. _Tilt angle_ is controlled by Redstone signals on its _sides_. Perfect for steering your _course_ without separate RCS _thrusters_.
block.rocketnautics.booster_thruster.fun: For those who want to be on the _Moon_ by _yesterday_. Side effects may include rapid _unplanned disassembly_.
block.rocketnautics.booster_thruster.sum: _Solid fuel_ booster. Provides immense _initial_ thrust, but cannot be throttled or turned off _once ignited_. Uses, believe it or not, _Coal blocks_ as fuel.
block.rocketnautics.rcs_thruster.funny: Shoots _air_. We all know it's just _sucking_ the oxygen _out of the cabin_.
block.rocketnautics.rcs_thruster.summary: _Essential_ for attitude control in a _vacuum_. Uses _compressed gas_ for _high-precision_ course correction.
block.rocketnautics.separator.funny: Essentially, a _controlled explosion_. Hopefully, only the parts that _should_ will fall off.
block.rocketnautics.separator.summary: Explosive bolts designed for _stage separation_. Vital for _shedding_ dead weight during ascent. Triggered by a _Redstone pulse_.
block.rocketnautics.sputnik.funny: Beep... Beep... Beep... A metal _potato_ in the vastness of _space_.
block.rocketnautics.sputnik.summary: An early _artificial satellite_. Acts as a permanent _Chunk Loader_ and reports _biome colors_. Can be integrated with _ComputerCraft_ for _cartography_.
block.rocketnautics.hologram_block.summa: Displays a hologram of the universe around itself at configurable scale and size. Short click the configuration points to increase/decrease the hologram scale.
item.rocketnautics.music_disc_space.funn: We noticed that one of our employees was playing some _game_ instead of _working_. We fired him, of course, but we _liked_ the _soundtrack_!
item.rocketnautics.music_disc_space.summ: A high-quality _recording_ from a _distant world_. Plays a relaxing _space-themed_ track in any _Jukebox_.
item.rocketnautics.jetpack.tooltip.summa: For those who find gravity a bit too clingy. Warning: Do not use as a personal heater.
item.rocketnautics.jetpack.tooltip.behav: Wearable flight system. Press _[G]_ to toggle _systems_. Uses _Fuel_ to provide vertical _thrust_. Hold _[Space]_ to defy physics (briefly).
Provides _Pressurized_ _Air_ to Equipment that requires it by slowly draining _Fuel_.
item.rocketnautics.jetpack.tooltip.condi: When Alt-Clicked with a Lava Bucket
item.rocketnautics.jetpack.tooltip.behav: Restores internal _Fuel_ from the _Lava Bucket_. Can also be refilled via _Spout_.
For those who find gravity inconvenient. And those who would like to stop drifting away.
Wearable flight aid. Gives access to _Creative Flight_ and _Inertial Dampeners_ by consuming _Pressurized_ _Air_. Press _[Z]_ to toggle _Inertial Dampeners_.
item.rocketnautics.copper_anchor_boots.t: For those who find gravity a desperately missed friend. Or would like to use stairs.
Provides _weak gravity_ when standing on a block. Allows _walking around_ as if _grounded_. Also acts like _Copper Diving Boots_.
block.rocketnautics.parachute_case.funny: Deploy with Redstone to slow down your inevitable crash.
block.rocketnautics.parachute_case.summa: Automatically deploys a parachute when receiving a Redstone signal.
block.rocketnautics.parachute_capsule.fu: Protects and holds the parachute package until deployment.
block.rocketnautics.parachute_capsule.su: A compact capsule designed to safely store a parachute before launch.
block.rocketnautics.titanium_ore.funny: The backbone of your future failed space missions.
block.rocketnautics.titanium_ore.summary: Rare ore found in high altitudes or deep underground. Essential for building strong, lightweight aerospace components.
block.rocketnautics.deepslate_titanium_o: Deep, dark, and slightly harder to mine. Just like my existential dread.
Titanium ore embedded in tough deepslate. Requires a diamond pickaxe or better to extract.
block.rocketnautics.raw_titanium_block.f: A pile of metal potatoes. Heavy metal potatoes.
block.rocketnautics.raw_titanium_block.s: A dense storage block for raw titanium. Can be uncrafted back into raw chunks.
block.rocketnautics.titanium_block.funny: Light as a feather, strong as a... really strong feather.
block.rocketnautics.titanium_block.summa: A solid block of refined titanium. Resistant to high temperatures and vacuum stress.
block.rocketnautics.titanium_alloy_block: Advanced alloy for extreme conditions. Perfect for engines and structural supports of heavy rockets.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_ingot.funny: Standard aerospace grade. Tastes like science.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_ingot.summar: Basic refined titanium. Used in most rocketry recipes.
item.rocketnautics.raw_titanium.funny: Looks like a potato, but it's actually metal. Don't eat it.
item.rocketnautics.raw_titanium.summary: Unrefined titanium ore. Must be smelted or processed in a blast furnace.
Looks like diced potato, but it's still metal. Seriously, don't eat it.
Unrefined crushed titanium ore. Must be smelted or processed in a blast furnace.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_alloy.funny: Double the toughness, double the weight, double the insurance cost.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_alloy.summar: Refined alloy of titanium and other metals. Superior strength and heat resistance.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_nugget.summa: Small piece of titanium. 9 nuggets make one ingot.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_alloy_nugget: Small piece of titanium alloy. Used for precision components.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_sheet.funny: Perfect for wrapping leftovers, if your leftovers are rocket engines.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_sheet.summar: Pressed titanium plate. Essential for hulls and fuel tanks.
NASA-grade foil. For very expensive sandwiches.
High-strength alloy sheet. Used in the most critical parts of the spacecraft.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_nozzle.funny: The business end of a rocket. Hot stuff coming through.
item.rocketnautics.titanium_nozzle.summa: Precision-engineered nozzle for liquid engines. Directs exhaust to provide thrust.
